name: Mushroom Sauce for Spaghetti (Portabella)
recipeInstructions:
Best to use a combination of mushrooms (such as oyster, shiitake, and portobella)
1. In a sauté pan, heat half the oil over medium heat and sauté mushrooms until wilted.
2. Add the vermouth and reduce the liquid by half. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, heat the remaining oil over high heat until it nearly smokes.
4. Toss in the tomatoes, garlic, and shallots, and braise for 4-5 minutes.
5. Add the mushrooms, reduced liquid, and remaining ingredients (basil, parsley, black pepper).
6. This sauce could very well use cheese with the pasta.
7. Will Decker - Not a Prodigy Special Contributor
